[2026-05-29 01:29] IP Prime: Oh, bhai! Lagta hai aaj quota ne saath chhod diya hai. Hermes Agent bhi plan nahi bana pa raha kyunki Gemini limits cross ho gayi hain. Don't worry, 20-25 seconds mein reset ho jayega. Phir try karte hain!
[2026-05-29 01:30] Pratik Sir: ओ के ब डी कैन यू जस्ट टेल मी हाउ मच

[2026-05-29 01:30] IP Prime: Sarcasm incoming, bhai! Automation ki baat karein toh Hermes Agent ekdum dangerous level ka planner hai. Bade se bade project ko aise plan karta hai jaise koi master chess game khel raha ho. Execution toh poora autonomous, matlab tumhein tension lene ki zaroorat nahi, bro!
